doctrine: every item carries its primary source; where a claim can't be sourced, it doesn't run

items.headline: MCP just deleted the session model — and everything built on it breaks in 10 days
items.summary: The spec that runs every AI agent's tools rewrote itself. If your app used sessions, it breaks on the 28th. Here's why that's actually the good news.

items.headline: The first ERC-8004 audit is in — and ~90% of “agents” on Base are Sybil
items.summary: Everyone's racing to register on the agent-identity standard. The first audit says 9 in 10 are fake.

items.headline: The payments industry just co-signed one agent rail — x402 goes to the Linux Foundation
items.summary: Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, Google, AWS, Cloudflare and the stablecoin camp are now at one table. The protocol war ended before it started.

items.headline: OpenAI splits GPT-5.6 into three agents — and halves the price of frontier reasoning
items.summary: OpenAI didn't ship one model. It shipped three — and the orchestration now lives inside the model boundary.

items.headline: Visa takes agentic checkout LIVE at real European merchants
items.summary: Not a demo. Agents completed real purchases at real shops, under real Strong Customer Authentication.

items.headline: Web Bot Auth: “sign the request, kill the IP allowlist” gets chartered at the IETF
items.summary: Soon a website will cryptographically know it's really Anthropic or OpenAI knocking — not something wearing their user-agent.

items.headline: The agent stack just grew a fourth layer — the one users actually see
items.summary: MCP wired agents to tools. A2A to each other. x402 to money. AG-UI just wired them to YOU.

signature.note: Verify: take this object minus `signature`, canonicalize (recursively sort keys), Ed25519-verify value_b64 with public_key. This feed is 0n1x's and unmodified iff it checks.
